name: Spectrum Bands (CHOP)
description: Reproducible twin of create_spectrum: turns audio into N named per-band energy channels (band0..band15) on a Null CHOP you can bind any parameter to. An audiooscillatorCHOP (white noise) stands in so it previews offline; swap for Audio Device In / Audio File In for a live set. The chain is FFT -> resample to exactly N bins -> shuffle samples-to-channels -> rename -> sensitivity gain -> null. This is the CHOP-data companion to the visual audio_spectrum_bars recipe. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: audioin
nodes.comment: Synthetic full-spectrum source — swap for audiodeviceinCHOP / audiofileinCHOP live.

nodes.name: spectrum_fft
nodes.comment: FFT spectrum at a fixed length (resampled down to the band count next).

nodes.name: rebin
nodes.comment: Reduce the FFT to exactly 16 bins (0..15) with linear averaging.

nodes.name: split
nodes.comment: Transpose: 1 channel x 16 samples -> 16 channels x 1 sample.

nodes.name: spectrum
nodes.comment: Stable bind point — bind parameters to op('spectrum')['band3'] etc.

preview_description: A CHOP utility, not an image: 16 live frequency-band channels (band0..band15) ready to drive any parameter, with a global sensitivity knob.
